HGSS.355.0000:
Oh no!\f
Hiding I was, but you did
me found in no time!\f
...
Me only one from another country.\f
Yet! No big business, OK?\f
Think I did, if stop the energy,
be big panic and unlucky\r
for here people!\f
Secret it is my mission,
so tell you I not!\f
But! If win you do versus me,
a man I be and mine secret\r
to you tell. You understand?\r
Battle begin we do!\f
HGSS.355.0002:
OK. Tell you mine secret will I.\f
Machine Part steal by me. Hide it
I did in Gym of the Cerulean.\f
Near inflatable tube put it I did.
Look for Gym at.\f
But you forget me not!
Beat you for sure will Team Rocket.\f
Come from Johto will they, mine
allies, yes. Will revenge they are.\f
HGSS.355.0003:
...\f
You say what? Team Rocket bye-bye
a go-go? Broken up it is says you?\f
Oh, no! Should I do what now on
from, me?\f
...OK.\f
I my country go home.\f
Make Team Rocket I will.
Good-bye! So long!\f
HGSS.355.0004:
Who is this guy in black?
Coming between me and my girlfriend...!
HGSS.355.0005:
We are finally alone.
You will not bother us, right?
HGSS.355.0006:
Can you leave us alone?\f
I am building a chemistry between us,
and it’s finally working.
HGSS.355.0008:
What’s wrong with that guy?
“Cerulean...near inflatable tube”\r
is the “Machine Part”?\r
What was he talking about?
HGSS.355.0009:
Just keep on going. Thank you.
No need to spoil this chemistry.
